text: Being here feels like stepping into a future shaped by collaboration and curiosity. The glass-walled room buzzes with communal learning and exchange, while vibrant displays on the wall celebrate research and innovation. I feel anticipation and inspiration—there is energy in the air, an intellectual restlessness that urges me to reflect on progress, the beauty of knowledge, and the interwoven destinies of humans and technology. I am simultaneously an observer and a participant in the unfolding story of discovery.
